title: Monodex Config
description: Main configuration for monodex - defines Qdrant connection and catalogs

collection.description: Qdrant collection name for storing embeddings

maxUploadBytes.description: Maximum upload payload size in bytes (default: 31457280 = 30MB). Qdrant has a 32MB limit; this setting provides a safety margin.

catalogs.description: Named catalog configurations. Keys are catalog names and must match the regex: ^[a-z0-9]+(?:-[a-z0-9]+)*$ (kebab-case, 1-64 chars). Authoritative validation is in src/engine/identifier.rs.

embeddingModel.description: Embedding model configuration for memory and CPU tuning

modelInstances.description: Number of ONNX model instances (sessions). Primary driver of memory usage. Use 'auto' for automatic sizing based on available memory.

threadsPerInstance.description: Threads per model instance for intra-op parallelism. CPU tuning only. Use 'auto' for automatic sizing based on CPU cores.

path.description: Path to the catalog root directory
